data.content:
South Asia
South Asia is a geographical region where India is located.

Bombay Stock Exchange
The Bombay Stock Exchange is an organization located in Mumbai.

Reserve Bank of India
The Reserve Bank of India is an organization headquartered in Mumbai that controls monetary policy.

Mumbai
Mumbai is the financial capital of India and home to the Bombay Stock Exchange, also serving as the headquarters for the Reserve Bank of India.

Narendra Modi
Narendra Modi has served as the Prime Minister of India since 2014.

British Rule
British Rule refers to the period of governance from which India became independent.

India
India is a country in South Asia, known as the seventh-largest by area and the most populous country, with one of the fastest-growing major economies.

New Delhi
New Delhi is the capital city of India.

August 15, 1947
August 15, 1947 is the date when India became independent from British rule.

Monetary Policy
Monetary policy is controlled by the Reserve Bank of India.

Indian Economy
The Indian Economy is described as one of the fastest-growing major economies.
